original: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refill at [Wells|Wells] or by killing monsters.

translation.zh_cn: 点击右键以喝下药剂。只有装备于腰带上时才会充能。可通过[Wells|水井]或击败怪物补充。
translation.zh_tw: 右鍵點擊以喝下藥劑。只有裝備於腰帶上時才會充能。在[Wells|水井]或殺死怪物可回復充能次數。

original: Used automatically when condition is met. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refill at [Wells|Wells] or by killing monsters.

translation.zh_cn: 满足条件时自动使用。只有装备于腰带上时才会充能。可通过[Wells|水井]或击败怪物补充。
translation.zh_tw: 達成特定條件時會自動使用。只有裝備於腰帶上時才會充能。可在[Wells|水井]，或是透過擊殺怪物補充。

translation.zh_cn: 可以免疫[Freeze|冻结]
translation.zh_tw: 賦予[Freeze|冰凍]免疫

translation.zh_cn: 陷入[Frozen|冻结]时自动使用
translation.zh_tw: 當你被[Frozen|冰凍]時使用

translation.zh_cn: 可以免疫[Bleeding|流血]
translation.zh_tw: 賦予[Bleeding|流血]免疫

translation.zh_cn: 你开始[Bleeding|流血]时自动使用
translation.zh_tw: 當你開始[Bleeding|流血]時使用

translation.zh_cn: 可以免疫[Poison|中毒]
translation.zh_tw: 賦予[Poison|中毒]免疫

translation.zh_cn: 陷入[Poison|中毒]时自动使用
translation.zh_tw: 當你被[Poison|中毒]時使用

translation.zh_cn: 可以免疫[Ignite|点燃]
translation.zh_tw: 賦予[Ignite|點燃]免疫

translation.zh_cn: 被[Ignite|点燃]时自动使用
translation.zh_tw: 當你被[Ignite|點燃]時使用

translation.zh_cn: 可以免疫[Shock|感电]
translation.zh_tw: 賦予[Shock|感電]免疫

translation.zh_cn: 陷入[Shock|感电]时自动使用
translation.zh_tw: 當你被[Shock|感電]時使用

translation.zh_cn: 免疫[Stunned|晕眩]
translation.zh_tw: 無法被[Stunned|暈眩]

translation.zh_cn: 当你被[Stunned|晕眩]时使用
translation.zh_tw: 當你被[Stunned|暈眩]時使用

translation.zh_cn: 你的速度不受[Slows|减速]效果影响
translation.zh_tw: 你的速度不受[Slows|緩速]影響

original: Used when you are affected by a [Slow|Slow]

translation.zh_cn: 当你受到[Slows|减速]影响时使用
translation.zh_tw: 當你受到[Slows|緩速]效果影響時使用

original: Used when you take [Fire|Fire] damage from a [Hit|Hit]

translation.zh_cn: 当你受到[Hit|击中][Fire|火焰]伤害时使用
translation.zh_tw: 當你被[Fire|火焰]傷害[Hit|擊中]時使用

original: Used when you take [Cold|Cold] damage from a [Hit|Hit]

translation.zh_cn: 当你受到[Hit|击中][Cold|冰霜]伤害时使用
translation.zh_tw: 當你被[Cold|冰冷]傷害[Hit|擊中]時使用

original: Used when you take [Lightning|Lightning] damage from a [Hit|Hit]

translation.zh_cn: 当你受到[Hit|击中][Lightning|闪电]伤害时使用
translation.zh_tw: 當你被[Lightning|閃電]傷害[Hit|擊中]時使用

original: Used when you take [Chaos|Chaos] damage from a [Hit|Hit]

translation.zh_cn: 当你受到[Hit|击中][Chaos|混沌]伤害时使用
translation.zh_tw: 當你被[Chaos|混沌]傷害[Hit|擊中]時使用

original: Used when you kill a [Rare|Rare] or [Unique|Unique] enemy

translation.zh_cn: 当你击败[Rare|稀有]或[Unique|传奇]敌人时使用
translation.zh_tw: 當你擊殺[Rare|稀有]或[Unique|傳奇]敵人時使用

translation.zh_cn: 免疫[Curses|诅咒]
translation.zh_tw: 賦予[Curses|詛咒]免疫

translation.zh_cn: 被[Curses|诅咒]时自动使用
translation.zh_tw: 當你被[Curses|詛咒]時使用

group.original: [Energy Shield Recharge|Energy Shield Recharge] starts on use

translation.zh_cn: 使用时开始[Energy Shield Recharge|能量护盾充能]
translation.zh_tw: 使用時開始[Energy Shield Recharge|能量護盾充能]

group.original:
"Even in the face of the Winter of the World,
life found a way. The Spirit always provides."

translation.zh_cn:
“即使面对世界之冬，生命也能找到出路。
万灵始终都在庇佑我们。”
translation.zh_tw:
「即使面對世界的凜冬，
靈魂依舊賦予生命的悸動。」

group.original: Creates [Consecrated Ground|Consecrated Ground] on use

translation.zh_cn: 使用时产生[Consecrated Ground|奉献地面]
translation.zh_tw: 使用時會製造[Consecrated Ground|奉獻地面]

group.original:
Wraeclast has known too few true heroes.
It remembers those that stood in defiance.

translation.zh_cn:
瓦尔克拉斯从未出过如此多的英雄豪杰。
这里会铭记那些敢于奋起反抗的勇者。
translation.zh_tw:
瓦爾克拉斯誕生過多少英雄好漢，
見證他們在時間的長河中掀起滔天波瀾。

group.original: Recover Life equal to {0}% of Mana [Flask's|Flask's] Recovery Amount when used

translation.zh_cn: 使用时回复等于魔力[Flask's|药剂]回复量的 {0}% 的生命
translation.zh_tw: 使用時，恢復相當於魔力[Flask's|藥劑]恢復量 {0}% 的生命

group.original: Recover Mana equal to {0}% of Life [Flask's|Flask's] Recovery Amount when used

translation.zh_cn: 使用时回复等于生命[Flask's|药剂]回复量的 {0}% 的魔力
translation.zh_tw: 使用時，恢復相當於生命[Flask's|藥劑]恢復量 {0}% 的魔力

group.original:
Devotees of the Goddess of Lust
needed never fear her sting.

translation.zh_cn: 放荡女神的信徒永远无需害怕她的毒刺。
translation.zh_tw:
慾之女神的虔誠信徒喜迎
那得天獨厚又錐心刺骨的寵幸。

group.original: Creates [Ignited Ground|Ignited Ground] for {1} seconds when used, [Igniting|Igniting] enemies as though dealing [Fire|Fire] damage equal to {0}% of your maximum Life

translation.zh_cn: 使用时造成持续 {1} 秒的[Ignited Ground|燃烧地面]，地面[Igniting|点燃]敌人时造成等同你最大生命 {0}% 的[Fire|火焰]伤害
translation.zh_tw: 使用時生成持續 {1} 秒的[Ignited Ground|點燃地面]來[Igniting|點燃]敵人，造成等同於你最大生命 {0}% 的[Fire|火焰]傷害

group.original:
They found a crying child tied to a frozen pyre.
She was clad in ice, but the village was ash.

translation.zh_cn:
他们在冰封的火堆上发现了嚎哭的孩子。
她被寒冰紧紧包裹，村庄却已化作燃灰。
translation.zh_tw:
他們在冰凍的火堆旁找到一個被綁住的哭鬧孩童。
她渾身覆滿凍霜，但整個村落卻化為灰燼。

group.original: [Lightning|Lightning] Damage of Enemies [Hitting|Hitting] you is [Unlucky|Unlucky] during effect

translation.zh_cn: 效果期间，敌人对你的[Hitting|击中][Lightning|闪电]伤害[Unlucky|特别不幸]
translation.zh_tw: 在效果期間，敵人[Hitting|擊中]你的[Lightning|閃電]傷害相當[Unlucky|不幸]

group.original:
The most beloved member of every Brinerot crew
is the one that refuses to do any actual work.

translation.zh_cn:
在布琳洛特的每艘船上，
最讨人喜爱的家伙都是从不干活儿的那个。
translation.zh_tw:
在布琳洛特集三千寵愛於一身，
卻不知何謂責任。

group.original: Defend with {0}% of [Armour|Armour] during effect

translation.zh_cn: 效果期间以 {0}% 的[Armour|护甲]防御
translation.zh_tw: 在效果期間，以 {0}% [Armour|護甲值]防禦

group.original:
"It may be centuries hence, but I still hold utmost faith.
The Saviour will rise, and mankind will be free."

translation.zh_cn:
“纵使千秋已逝，我仍怀至深信仰。
T救赎者将会崛起，人类将会自由。”
translation.zh_tw:
「經歷無數世紀，我依舊堅信
T救世主將挺身而出，帶領人們迎向自由光明。」

group.original: Grants [Onslaught|Onslaught] during effect

translation.zh_cn: 效果期间获得[Onslaught|猛攻]
translation.zh_tw: 在效果期間賦予[Onslaught|猛攻]

group.original:
"When the headsman's blade swings,
your last moments stretch to eternity."
- Vorm, the Twice-Pardoned

translation.zh_cn:
“处刑者挥起大刀之时，
最后一刻便永远定格。”
——被特赦两次的沃尔姆
translation.zh_tw:
「劊子手的刀刃斬下時，
無盡的歲月將在眼前消逝。」
- 逃過死劫兩次的沃姆

group.original: Grants up to your maximum [Rage|Rage] on use

translation.zh_cn: 使用时获得最大[Rage|怒火]
translation.zh_tw: 使用時賦予你最大[Rage|盛怒]

group.original: Kaom was not known for his restraint.

translation.zh_cn: 冈姆的英名与隐忍毫无关联。
translation.zh_tw: 岡姆並不因自我克制而為人所知。

group.original: Grants a [Power Charge|Power Charge] on use

translation.zh_cn: 使用时给予一个[Power Charge|能量球]
translation.zh_tw: 使用時賦予一個[Power Charge|暴擊球]

group.original:
"To scrape the sky,
to touch the clouds themselves,
is to know true freedom."
- Mutewind saying

translation.zh_cn:
“翱翔天际，
触碰流云，
方知自由为何物。”
——哑风谚语
translation.zh_tw:
「擁抱蒼穹、
駕馭驅使雲霧雷電的勁風，
方能體認自由的感動。」
- 啞風之言

group.original: Grants a [Frenzy Charge|Frenzy Charge] on use

translation.zh_cn: 使用时给予一个[Frenzy Charge|狂怒球]
translation.zh_tw: 使用時賦予一個[Frenzy Charge|狂怒球]

group.original:
The sea swells, the sky thunders; two ships tilt at odds.
Flashes of light show only swinging axes... and a grin.

translation.zh_cn:
海涛汹汹，天雷滚滚，双舸竞斗冲。
电闪破黑云，刀光映斧影，唯见寒笑森森。
translation.zh_tw:
浪濤洶湧、電馳雷鳴；百尺之船焉能奈何命運此刻酩酊？
疾光迅影之間，卻只映照出揮舞的斧頭……還有一抹微笑。

group.original: {0}% of [Chaos|Chaos] damage you prevent when [Hit|Hit] [Recouped|Recouped] as Life and Mana during effect

translation.zh_cn: 效果期间，你被[Hit|击中]时阻挡的[Chaos|混沌]伤害的 {0}% [Recouped|吸纳]为生命和魔力
translation.zh_tw: 抵禦遭[Hit|擊中]所承受的[Chaos|混沌]傷害時，其 {0}% 會[Recouped|補償]為生命和魔力

group.original:
Among the Templars, a secret few ate the sins of others.
They bore this burden to empower their hidden Order.

translation.zh_cn:
在圣堂武僧中，少数秘密成员以他人的罪恶为食。
他们负重前行，只为让他们的隐秘教团发展壮大。
translation.zh_tw:
聖騎士的行列中，一部分仰賴他人罪惡為生，
肩負這份重擔讓他們的勢力得以興盛。

group.original: [Possessed|Possessed] by [Spirit Of The Bear|Spirit Of The Bear] for {0} seconds on use

translation.zh_cn: 使用时被[Spirit Of The Bear|巨熊之灵][Possessed|附身] {0} 秒
translation.zh_tw: 使用時會被[Spirit Of The Bear|熊之魂][Possessed|附身]，持續 {0} 秒

group.original: [Possessed|Possessed] by [Spirit Of The Boar|Spirit Of The Boar] for {0} seconds on use

translation.zh_cn: 使用时被[Spirit Of The Boar|野猪之灵][Possessed|附身] {0} 秒
translation.zh_tw: 使用時會被[Spirit Of The Boar|野豬之魂][Possessed|附身]，持續 {0} 秒

group.original: [Possessed|Possessed] by [Spirit Of The Cat|Spirit Of The Cat] for {0} seconds on use

translation.zh_cn: 使用时被[Spirit Of The Cat|豹之灵][Possessed|附身] {0} 秒
translation.zh_tw: 使用時會被[Spirit Of The Cat|貓之魂][Possessed|附身]，持續 {0} 秒

group.original: [Possessed|Possessed] by [Spirit Of The Owl|Spirit Of The Owl] for {0} seconds on use

translation.zh_cn: 使用时被[Spirit Of The Owl|枭之灵][Possessed|附身] {0} 秒
translation.zh_tw: 使用時會被[Spirit Of The Owl|貓頭鷹之魂][Possessed|附身]，持續 {0} 秒

group.original: [Possessed|Possessed] by [Spirit Of The Ox|Spirit Of The Ox] for {0} seconds on use

translation.zh_cn: 使用时被[Spirit Of The Ox|蛮牛之灵][Possessed|附身] {0} 秒
translation.zh_tw: 使用時會被[Spirit Of The Ox|公牛之魂][Possessed|附身]，持續 {0} 秒

group.original: [Possessed|Possessed] by [Spirit Of The Primate|Spirit Of The Primate] for {0} seconds on use

translation.zh_cn: 使用时被[Spirit Of The Primate|狂猿之灵][Possessed|附身] {0} 秒
translation.zh_tw: 使用時會被[Spirit Of The Primate|猿猴之魂][Possessed|附身]，持續 {0} 秒

group.original: Possessed by a random Spirit for {0} seconds on use

translation.zh_cn: 使用时被一个随机灵体附身 {0} 秒
translation.zh_tw: 使用時，受一個隨機魂靈附身，持續 {0} 秒

group.original: [Possessed|Possessed] by [Spirit Of The Serpent|Spirit Of The Serpent] for {0} seconds on use

translation.zh_cn: 使用时被[Spirit Of The Serpent|蛇之灵][Possessed|附身] {0} 秒
translation.zh_tw: 使用時會被[Spirit Of The Serpent|蝮蛇之魂][Possessed|附身]，持續 {0} 秒

group.original: [Possessed|Possessed] by [Spirit Of The Stag|Spirit Of The Stag] for {0} seconds on use

translation.zh_cn: 使用时被[Spirit Of The Stag|雄鹿之灵][Possessed|附身] {0} 秒
translation.zh_tw: 使用時會被[Spirit Of The Stag|公鹿之魂][Possessed|附身]，持續 {0} 秒

group.original: [Possessed|Possessed] by [Spirit Of The Wolf|Spirit Of The Wolf] for {0} seconds on use

translation.zh_cn: 使用时被[Spirit Of The Wolf|头狼之灵][Possessed|附身] {0} 秒
translation.zh_tw: 使用時會被[Spirit Of The Wolf|狼之魂][Possessed|附身]，持續 {0} 秒

group.original:
To become a warrior and a hunter, each young
Azmeri must prove themselves before the Spirit.

translation.zh_cn:
要想成为战士和猎手，每个年轻的
阿兹莫里人都必须在万灵面前证明自己。
translation.zh_tw:
阿茲莫里的年少戰士和獵人面對魂靈，
必須用盡一切手段證明自身的價值。

translation.zh_cn: 基础 前缀
translation.zh_tw: 基礎 前綴

group.original: {0}% increased Life Recovered

translation.zh_cn: 生命回复提高 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 增加 {0}% 生命恢復

group.original: {0}% increased Mana Recovered

translation.zh_cn: 魔力回复提高 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 增加 {0}% 魔力恢復

group.original: Removes {0}% of Life Recovered from Mana when used

translation.zh_cn: 使用时会移除魔力，等同于生命回复值的 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 使用時，會扣除生命恢復值 {0}% 的魔力

group.original: Removes {0}% of Mana Recovered from Life when used

translation.zh_cn: 使用时会移除生命，等同于魔力回复值的 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 使用時，會扣除魔力恢復值 {0}% 的生命

group.original: {0}% increased Amount Recovered

translation.zh_cn: 回复量提高 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 增加 {0}% 恢復量

group.original: {0}% more Recovery if used while on [Low Life|Low Life]

translation.zh_cn: 恢复效果在[Low Life|低血]状态下使用时总增 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 增加 {0}% 若在[Low Life|貧血狀態]下使用，恢復量

group.original: {0}% more Recovery if used while on Low Mana

translation.zh_cn: 回复效果在低魔下使用时总增 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 增加 {0}% 貧魔狀態下使用時，回復量

group.original: {0}% reduced Amount Recovered

translation.zh_cn: 回复量降低 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 減少 {0}% 恢復量

group.original: Instant Recovery

translation.zh_cn: 立即回复
translation.zh_tw: 立即恢復

group.original: Grants {0}% of Life Recovery to Minions

translation.zh_cn: 给召唤生物提供 {0}% 生命恢复效果
translation.zh_tw: 得到 {0}% 召喚物生命恢復

group.original: {0}% increased Recovery rate

translation.zh_cn: 回复速度提高 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 增加 {0}% 恢復率

group.original: {0}% of Recovery applied Instantly

translation.zh_cn: 立即回复 {0}% 回复量
translation.zh_tw: {0}% 恢復量立即恢復

group.original: Recover {0} Life when Used

translation.zh_cn: 使用时回复 {0} 生命
translation.zh_tw: 使用後恢復 {0} 生命

group.original: Recover {0} Mana when Used

translation.zh_cn: 使用时回复 {0} 魔力
translation.zh_tw: 使用後恢復 {0} 魔力

group.original: Also grants {0} [Guard|Guard]

translation.zh_cn: 同时获得 {0} [Guard|防卫]
translation.zh_tw: 同時賦予 {0} 層[Guard|守護]

group.original: {0}% increased Duration

translation.zh_cn: 持续时间提高 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 增加 {0}% 持續時間

translation.zh_cn: 基础 后缀
translation.zh_tw: 基礎 後綴

group.original: {0}% Chance to gain a [Charge|Charge] when you kill an enemy

translation.zh_cn: 击败敌人时有 {0}% 的几率获得一个[Charge|能量球]
translation.zh_tw: 殺死敵人時有 {0}% 機率獲得一顆[Charge|能量球]

group.original: {0}% increased Charges gained

translation.zh_cn: 获得的充能提高 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 增加 {0}% 獲得的能量球

group.original: {0}% reduced Charges per use

translation.zh_cn: 每次使用消耗的充能次数降低 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 每次使用減少 {0}% 充能

group.original: {0}% increased Charges

translation.zh_cn: 充能提高 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: {0}% 額外補充量

group.original: Gains {0} Charges per Second

translation.zh_cn: 每秒获得 {0} 次充能
translation.zh_tw: 每秒獲得 {0} 充能
